text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
Welcome all to the First Fantasy Kinen. I'm Mystic Granny, 
and I'll be your commentator for today.

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but suddenly I am filled with a sense of foreboding…!
Come, horsegirls. Altogether now…

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's going on? Grass! My starting gate won't open!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Is this… an arcane lock spell? Is that allowed?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll just cast Unlock. Now go! Hurry, El!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you're a lifesaver! Okay. Imma get you, Horse Lord!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Welp, guess I'll just summon my Horse Minions! 
Go get 'em, guys!

text_block_list.name: Horse Minions
text_block_list.text: Honse! Honse, Honse!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, that's no bueno! I'm completely surrounded, but I'll try 
and break through with my Condor fighting techniques!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaah! Hiyooooh! Wataaaah!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Pant… Pant… I'm running outta steam!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Greater Heal!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the backup, Grass! I'm starting to get 
the hang of this pattern!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Fiddlesticks! Useless cronies! 
Guess this is a job only a lord can finish!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaah! Eat this! Earthquake!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I won't let you do that! Portal Shift!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ohh, you saved me! Let's finish this, once and for all!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: You won't get away with this! The real race starts now!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Picklestones! Descend from the vast cosmos! Meteor Strike!!!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Not on my watch! I'll shield us — Holy Barrier!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Crafty, aren't we? I'll have to kick it up a notch, then! 
Meteor Storm!!!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gaaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where am I now? Did I get one-shotted? That suuucks…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You can't die, El! This isn't the time 
to be messing around in Umadegard!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Full Revival!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm ready for more!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
What? You're back from the dead? Seems like I'd better 
prioritize taking out Grass first.

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah! Dark Celestial Orb!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Graaaaass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El… don't look back! Horsegirls run for something… 
more precious than a friend's life, right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So go on without me. I may not be able to heal you anymore, 
but I can give you… my hope.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: GRASS!!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! While you're busy with that 
pity party of yours, I'll be on my way!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Noooo! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
What?! How are you accelerating so fast?! 
I thought you'd used up all your skills!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I don't need any fantasy skills! This is a race, 
the place where a horsegirl's true magic shines!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: What matters most is power and endurance!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa! Impossible!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No obstacle can hold us back! Carrying the hopes of our 
fallen friends, us horsegirls will put our lives on the line! 
All for one thing…

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And one thing alone! VICTORY!!!
(Wooooo!)

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
And she's crossed the finish line! El Condor Pasa 
takes the win! I can see it crystal clear, even with 
my poor eyesight!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Pretty sure your eyesight has been fine this entire time!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Darn it! I lost… But I live to fight another day! 
Just you wait and see!
